txt_en: Our most beautiful things in the world are by Labour, by human's hand created.
txt_cn: 世界上最美好的东西，都是由劳动、由人的聪明的双手创造出来的。

txt_en: Kindness is a language that the deaf can hear and the blind can see.
txt_cn: 善良是一种语言，聋者能听，盲者能见。

txt_en: Still water runs deep.
txt_cn: 静水流深。

txt_en: From now on, if there is no torchlight, then I will be the only light.
txt_cn: 此后如竟没有炬火，我便是唯一的光。

txt_en: Summer, after all, is a time when wonderful things can happen to quiet people.
txt_cn: 毕竟，夏天是安静之人也会遇到美好事情的季节。

txt_en: Energy and persistence conquer all things.
txt_cn: 精力与坚持，能征服万物。

txt_en: We all live under the same sky, but we don't all have the same horizon.
txt_cn: 我们头顶同一片天空，但眼中的地平线却各不相同。

txt_en: Life is a game in which the player must appear ridiculous.
txt_cn: 人生就是一场游戏，所有玩家都必须表现得很荒唐。

txt_en: It's not who we are underneath, but what we do that defines us.
txt_cn: 决定我们是谁的，不是我们的内在本性，而是我们的所作所为。

txt_en: Life began with waking up and loving my mother's face.
txt_cn: 生命始于醒来之时，始于爱上母亲的面容。

txt_en: Send me the words 'Goodnight' to put under my pillow.
txt_cn: 请在临睡前向我道声“晚安”，我要把它放在我的枕头下面。

txt_en: You never know how strong you are until being strong is your only choice.
txt_cn: 唯有身处低谷，你才会发现自己有多坚强。

txt_en: When all is lost, then all is found.
txt_cn: 一切尽失时，一切将再临。

txt_en: Youth is the gift of nature, but age is a work of art.
txt_cn: 青春是自然的馈赠，而年岁是艺术的杰作。

txt_en: Trees are poems that the earth writes upon the sky.
txt_cn: 树是大地写在天空的诗。

txt_en: Good fences make good neighbors.
txt_cn: 好篱笆造就好邻居。

txt_en: No one is useless in this world who lightens the burdens of another.
txt_cn: 在这个世界上，凡是能为他人减轻负担的人，都不是无用之辈。

txt_en: Suffering has been stronger than all other teaching.
txt_cn: 痛苦比其他任何教训都更有力量。

txt_en: Wanting to be someone else is a waste of the person you are.
txt_cn: 想要成为别人是对你自己的浪费。

txt_en: The sun is new each day.
txt_cn: 太阳每天都是新的。

txt_en: Let life be beautiful like summer flowers and death like autumn leaves.
txt_cn: 使生如夏花之绚烂，死如秋叶之静美。

txt_en: A day without laughter is a day wasted.
txt_cn: 没有笑声的一天，就是虚度的一天。

txt_en: The great tragedy of life is not that men perish, but that they cease to love.
txt_cn: 人生最大的悲剧，不是人终有一死，而是人终有一日不再去爱。

txt_en: The only limit to our realization of tomorrow will be doubts.
txt_cn: 实现明天理想的唯一障碍，就是今日的疑虑。

txt_en: Without music, life would be a mistake and a meaningless, dreary existence.
txt_cn: 没有音乐，生命将是一个错误，一段毫无意义的灰暗岁月。

txt_en: The summer morning was a soft pink bubble resting on the green pasture.
txt_cn: 夏日的清晨，宛如一枚粉色的柔软气泡，停歇在绿色牧场上。

txt_en: I deeply and completely love and accept myself just as I am.
txt_cn: 我深深地、完全地爱并接受真实的自己。

txt_en: Let your life come amongst them like a flame of light, unflickering and pure.
txt_cn: 让你的生命如同一束纯净而稳定的光焰，照入人群之中。

txt_en: Time is the most valuable thing a person can spend.
txt_cn: 时间是一个人所能花费的最宝贵的东西。

txt_en: Keep your face always toward the sunshine, and shadows will fall behind you.
txt_cn: 始终面朝阳光，那样阴影自会退至你身后。
